Our assortment features healthy, low calorie lollipops, hard candy, caramels, chocolates and more! Dr. John's candies are tailored to diverse dietary preferences, including gluten free, keto friendly, vegan, and kosher diets! These candies also feature no artificial sweeteners or colors, making them the perfect sweet treat to have throughout your day, without the guilt! How do we do it? overall_summary: Dr. John’s Healthy Sweets positions itself as a premium dietary candy brand targeting health-conscious consumers, particularly those following keto, gluten-free, or vegan diets. The absence of artificial ingredients and inclusion of dietary certifications (Kosher, non-GMO, gluten-free) enhance its appeal to niche markets, while the oval shape and natural cherry flavor add a distinct, premium touch.
